--- Main Page ---
a mano
0
Slide 1
Slide 1 (current slide)
Slide 2
Slide 2 (current slide)
Slide 3
Slide 3 (current slide)
Slide 4
Slide 4 (current slide)
Slide 5
Slide 5 (current slide)
o u r  s t o r y
a mano is a neighborhood Italian bistro that was established in 2017. a mano means "by hand," while "amano" means "they love." this name perfectly encapsulates our culture and ethos. our focus is grounded in seasonal ingredients and traditional cooking methods. this approach is also taken in our beverage program, which focuses on natural and biodynamic wines and crafting exceptional cocktails. we are committed to serving our community through the quality of our food and beverages and warm and welcoming hospitality.
reservations
reservations are
highly
recommended, especially on weekends
booking is available for
lunch
11:00 am-2:30 pm and
dinner
5:00 pm-9:00 pm
for parties of
1-8
, please book through
Resy.
Book your a mano reservation on Resy
indoor bar seating is full service and always open for walk-ins!
celebrate with us!
whether you’re celebrating something big or small, a mano is here for you. have us cater your next event, or grab all your loved ones and bring them over! whatever the occasion, we’d be thrilled to help you and your guests make new memories.
catering
private dining
location
587 Ralph McGill Blvd. NE
Atlanta, GA 30312
we are located a 1/4 mile off the Beltline and 1/2 a mile from Ponce City Market at the intersection of Ralph McGill Blvd. and Glen Iris Dr. NE
follow our journey
@amanoatl

a mano + elemental spirits co. tuesday bottle deals
Tuesday, February 24, 2026
5:00 PM
9:30 PM
a mano
(map)
Google Calendar
ICS
Elemental Spirits Co.’s director of customer experience, and David Guth, a mano’s beverage director, handpick three exceptional wines to be featured on Tuesdays. this is a fantastic opportunity to treat yourself to exquisite wines at unbeatable discounted prices! to make it even better, you can also purchase these wines to take home from Elemental at discounted prices if you join us for dinner on Tuesday nights. don't let this chance to try some truly unique wines slip by.
View Event →

a mano

Google Calendar
ICS
February’s lends a hand beneficiary is
Mercy Care
!
Mercy Care is a federally qualified health center and Atlanta’s only healthcare for the homeless program. they aim to offer support to those who are experiencing homelessness, poverty, mental illness, or language barriers.
dine in or grab takeout on any Thursday evening this month, and we will donate on your behalf!
to learn more about our program, click the link
here

meta.meta_description:
echoing the personality of Old Fourth Ward in Atlanta, a mano is a 
neighborhood bistro with a casual atmosphere serving traditional Italian 
dishes with a southern twist
